title: Gin’s Loyalty Breaks Under Krieg’s Cruelty
scene: On pages 4–7, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Gin is ordered to kill Sanji, but his debt and sympathy clash with Don Krieg’s brutal command.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: T-that cook landed a hit on gin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Y... you don't think even gin'll be done in by him, do you...?

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Hmph, just what are you fools doubting gin's fighting abilities for...?

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: You've all seen for yourself what he's capable of.

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: It's exactly because of that nature that I placed him as the battle commander.

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: He'll show his true abilities in just a little while...

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Gin's a mercless killer who doesn't even hesitate for a second in brutally slaughtering his enemies, whether they be crying or begging...

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: that's why he's the cold-hearted "demon," without a shred of compassion...!

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
